title: phenax neilgherrensis
intro: Phenax neilgherrensis, also known as the Himalayan Pennywort, is a species of plant that belongs to the family Apiaceae and is native to the Himalayan region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The plant is rich in flavonoids and other bioactive compounds that offer several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cognitive function, and supporting cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of Phenax neilgherrensis include decoctions, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various ailments, including fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems.
